name: Alex Dietrich
summary: Former U.S. Navy F/A-18 pilot and firsthand witness to the November 2004 Nimitz encounter.
profileSummary: Former U.S. Navy F/A-18 pilot and firsthand witness to the November 2004 Nimitz encounter.
background: Former U.S. Navy fighter pilot who flew in the second aircraft during the Nimitz interception.
inclusionNote: Included because of her firsthand role in the Nimitz encounter and extensive on-the-record public testimony about the event.

referenceSources.label: 60 Minutes interview on Navy UAP encounters
